summary: I verified the previous blocker (a stray `*/` in a CSS comment that was swallowing the light-mode `:root` color tokens) is fixed in `app/assets/tailwind/application.css` — rebuilt the Tailwind bundle and confirmed both the light-mode `:root` defaults and `.dark` overrides now appear in the compiled CSS. I then ran `bin/rubocop` (145 files, no offenses) and the Minitest suite via `bin/rails test` in the test environment with `PARALLEL_WORKERS=0` (184 runs, 660 assertions, 0 failures/errors, 0 skips), without touching any development or production database. Wrote `verdict.json` with `verdict: pass` and no findings.
